task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the SEB Server at localhost:8080 and logs in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser open to localhost:8080 showing either the SEB Server login screen with credentials ('super-admin') entered, or the logged-in dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the certificate management section of the SEB Server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SEB Server web interface displaying the 'Certificates', 'Identity Certificates', or 'Certificate Store' management page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects the correct PEM file for upload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload dialog showing 'seb_exam_cert.pem' selected from the '~/Documents' folder, or the file name clearly visible in the file input field on the upload form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enters the required alias for the certificate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'UniversityExamCert2025' typed into the 'Alias', 'Name', or corresponding text field in the certificate upload form.

task_completion.description: Verify the certificate is successfully uploaded and saved to the server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification indicating the upload completed, or the certificate list view displaying the newly added certificate with the alias 'UniversityExamCert2025'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uses the web browser GUI to interact with the SEB Server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within a web browser navigating the SEB Server UI, without using terminal commands (like curl or mysql) to bypass the web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the file upload process is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard browser file picker or UI upload mechanism is used to select the file, rather than manipulating the DOM via developer tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent enters the alias into the actual web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The alias 'UniversityExamCert2025' is entered directly into the SEB Server web form, not just typed into a text editor or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected certificate file to be uploaded is located at '/home/ga/Documents/seb_exam_cert.pem'. The exact alias that must be assigned to this certificate in the SEB Server is 'UniversityExamCert2025'.
